person.name: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor

nameForms.fullText: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor

spouse.name: Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond

zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor於1270年之前與Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor于1270年之前与Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Ogd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alphonse, Gesner, Jacques.
French (Ogé): variant of Ogier or Auger (compare Auge ) and, in North America, also an altered form of the latter. The surname Ogé is also found in Haiti.
Turkish (Öge, also Öğe): ornamental name or nickname from regional öge ‘genius’, or from its archaic homonym meaning ‘fame’.

variants.name: Ogier
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Ogier, from ancient Germanic Audagari, composed of the elements audha- ‘wealth, power’ + gaira- ‘lance, spear’.
French: variant of Augier, itself a variant of Auger .

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Mor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Ari, Arie, Avi, Eliezer, Erez, Etty, Haim, Hedva, Ilan, Itai, Moshe, Noam.
Jewish (Israeli): shortened and Hebraicized form of some original Ashkenazic surname starting in Mor-.

variants.name: Mohr
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone who lived in a fen, Middle Low German mōr.
German, Jewish (Ashkenazic), Danish, and Dutch (of German origin): nickname for a man of swarthy complexion, from Middle High German mōr, German Mohr, and Middle Dutch moor ‘Moor’.
German: from a short form of an old personal name, Morhart (see Morath ).

nameMeanings.name: Domhnaill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: from Old Celtic dubno ‘world’ + val ‘rule’. See also Donald .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor married Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond before 1270, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor a épousé Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond avant 1270, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor hat vor 1270 in Irland Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor lei sposato Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond prima del 1270, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Morは1270年以前にアイルランドでDomhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmondと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor(은)는 1270년 이전 아일랜드에서 Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor casou-se com Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond antes 1270, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor вышла замуж за человека по имени Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond перед 1270 г. в местности Ирландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs Domhnaill Ogd Mac Carthaigh Mor se casó con Domhnaill Óge Mac Carthaigh Mór King of Desmond antes de 1270, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
